title: Oil falls amid easing geopolitical tensions
section_path: Oil falls amid easing geopolitical tensions
section_path_text: Oil falls amid easing geopolitical tensions
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Easing geopolitical risks weighed on energy prices last week, compounded by fading expectations of an imminent Fed rate cut. Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-05 16.42.45.png | assets/2024-02-05_oil-falls-amid-easing-geopolitical-tensions_img_screenshot2024-02-05164245_0793d994ba6d.png
Crude oil prices slumped last week as early negotiations to halt the bombardment of Gaza and release hostages gained traction. The four-month Israel-Hamas conflict has raised concerns that it would spread across the Middle East and disrupt oil supplies.
